findings.desc: BUG-2: Single-char double-quote input -> range exception (input[1..^1] invalid for length-1 string).
Unclosed opening quote at start silently discards all input content.
Adjacent quoted strings emit 2 tokens not 1. Closing quote triggers yield+reset.
Empty option name not rejected: '--:value' produces currentOption='' silently.
OQ-3: KeyNotFoundException if unknown option bypasses ValidateNoUnknownOptions step.
OQ-3(new): Missing required option (Min>0) not detected here — only detected via ValidateConfigurationAsync.

lean_setup.note: Mathlib removed from lakefile.toml this run (Task 9). No .lean files use it. Add [[require]] block back when first .lean file imports Mathlib.
lean_setup.elan_install_method: python3: urllib.request.urlretrieve then tarfile.extractall then subprocess.run([elan-init, -y, --default-toolchain, leanprover/lean4:v4.14.0])
lean_setup.important_note: String.replace, String.startsWith, String.drop, String.take etc are @[extern] and NOT kernel-reducible. Use native_decide (not decide) for all concrete string evaluation theorems. decide works for pure Prop/Bool without String ops.
